creator: 0xcdcdcdcd@gmail.com
text:
I want to use FreeBSD 13-RELEASE/ARM AMI on ap-northeast-3 (osaka), but can't find it.
Currently, t4g, m6g, c6g, and r6g are also offered in ap-northeast-3.

I expect this to be offered at the AMI Market place in ap-northeast-3.


P.S.
I tried copying a custom AMI created in ap-northeast-1 to ap-northeast-3, but it was region-restricted and could not boot.
